title: #6 - Why is my account not active yet?
bodyHtml:
Why is my account not active ? 

Your account and all your listings will appear “OFFLINE” until your account will be validated by the Activation team.

 

Once you have completed all the sections of the onboarding and you see this ⬇ in your Back Office, please send an email to activation-eu@backmarket.com.






By doing so, you’ll let them know you’ve already completed this part and are ready to continue on the next steps of your onboarding process.

And that’s it. Welcome to Back Market!
